config.script:
import json
	importJson=json.loads(event.file.getString())
	self.view.custom.jsonUpload=importJson
	
	metaData=importJson.get("metaData",False)
	version=importJson.get("version",False)
	if "version" not in importJson:
		palette_conns=self.view.params.connectionList
		outputJson=Convert.convert_architecture(importJson, palette_conns=palette_conns, importType="Upload")
	elif importJson['version']=="RF202606":
		outputJson=importJson
	else:
		outputJson=importJson	
	
	self.view.custom.jsonUpload=importJson
	self.view.custom.outputJson=outputJson
	system.perspective.sendMessage("fileUpload", payload={"outputJson":outputJson}, scope="session")
